parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 clean-input-contract parity — dirty raw AppData (session lifecycle residue + an impossible >240-minute duration) must pass through buildCleanAppDataView/createCleanTrainingDecisionInput before the engine sees it. The golden proves the clean-input path ran (cleanViewBuilt=true) and the dirt was detected (lifecycleResidueSessionIds + invalidDurationSessionIds non-empty) so dirty raw fields never leak into live advice.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData. One session carries active-session lifecycle residue (running rest timer + currentExerciseId on a completed session); another carries an impossible 9999-minute duration. Both are repairable and must be cleaned by the view, not the engine.
